official_degree_name: Master of Business Administration – General Management (MBA) for non-business students
program_description: MBA for non-business students focused on general management, leadership, and case-based business decision-making.
admission_requirements: Bachelor's degree from a recognized university; MBA Entrance Exam required unless the applicant has a GMAT score above 500; letter of intent, two recommendation letters, CV, and certified bachelor's transcripts.
gmat_requirement: GMAT score above 500 exempts the applicant from the MBA Entrance Exam.
